_comment: OPERATOR-DROPPED LOCAL FILE (test copy, IMPLEMENTATION-014F) -- structured extract of an IREN earnings-call transcript carrying capacity / lead-time / shortage statements for the Bottleneck Evidence sensor. Company speakers are company_claim; an analyst's question is reported_claim. Deterministic; local file only.
event_name: IREN Q1 FY2026 earnings call (evidence slice)

prepared_remarks.speaker: R. Founder
prepared_remarks.text: We energized 30 megawatts of new capacity during the quarter and the expansion remains on plan

prepared_remarks.speaker: S. Steward
prepared_remarks.text: Lead times for our actuator modules extended to 52 weeks this quarter

prepared_remarks.speaker: S. Steward
prepared_remarks.text: We remain on allocation with several component suppliers and supply remains tight across the fleet

qa.speaker: Jane Doe
qa.text: How much additional capacity will the Phase 2 expansion add next year?
